current_checkpoint.summary: TASK-073 is active and the runtime is implementation-ready.

previous_checkpoint.summary: TASK-072 was the latest completed checkpoint.

changes_since_last_checkpoint.summary: TASK-072 completed: v6.7 frontier: archmap-impact-audit machine verification
TASK-073 is now the active frontier: v6.7 frontier: review provenance audit

Implement TASK-073 review-provenance-audit: a safe_read verifier that fails when implementation-grade work claims Guardian/Council review without resolvable maker/checker/council provenance. Verification gate: negative fixture with self-attested or missing review provenance must fail plus unit tests and command help metadata. Stop condition: audit-only scope; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of review provenance, not proof that the review was semantically correct.
